CustomField.description: JSON for the MULTI_OBJECT_DISTINCT operator: {"sources":[{object, customerField, userField, dateField, filters, filterLogic, soql}]}. Each source's generated `soql` is run by PBISActuals_Service and the distinct customers are unioned per user.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Configured automatically by the S&D Parameter builder for the Unique Customers (multi-object) operator.
CustomField.label: Source Config
